title: Ek halay “men should apologise” wala status ta defend korte jaya post korse - “w...
description: Ek halay “men should apologise” wala status ta defend korte jaya post korse - “woman should be grateful for men who protect them”. . . .FROM *MEN* !!! Bhai tui kaar team e bhai! Tui ken korli eda !
